required_facts.fact: Nous Research is an open-source AI research organization focused on models and distributed training infrastructure.
Its mission emphasizes unrestricted open-source AI availability and human freedom.
Its portfolio spans models, agents, datasets, frameworks, infrastructure, papers, and simulators.
Hermes Agent is an open-source self-hosted autonomous agent with persistent memory and automation capabilities.
Nous actively publishes research and releases across several technical AI domains.

important_facts.fact: Psyche is positioned as open infrastructure for democratizing AI development.
The reviewed sources show an open artifact and ecosystem motion rather than standard SaaS pricing.
